name: Super Micro Computer, Inc.
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. is a global leader in high-performance, high-efficiency server and storage technology. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and sells enterprise-class, high-performance, high-efficiency server and storage solutions. Their products are used in various markets including cloud computing, data center, big data, high-performance computing (HPC), artificial intelligence (AI), and 5G/telecom infrastructure.
